title: Light Goes In (Reprise)
lyrics: I'm back in the hideout, I'm back in the right one Can't hide no more from you, I can't hide from my past man What we gonna do again? Every time I look deep into your eyes I know Never meant to hurt you baby girl, no more All the pain and tears that I hide inside No pride, no surprises, I tried and tried Too many lies, no compromise, only rise Tears that I cry inside remain dry Stuffed deep inside with no one to confide Running away, far away, but no place to hide Every story gots at least two sides Part truth, part lies, keeping my eyes on the prize Gonna rise, remain wise, gonna rise till I die Alright, I think it's best for us to say goodbye Quit the fight, sacrifice, worth the price Now suffice, let your taste buds entice Take some advice, yeah, never thinking twice Twice nice, what I like, I'm gonna write Doing it right all night, despite your ways So quick to take flight, just a fly away It's gonna be alright, it's gonna be okay Just might seem to fade down the path I stray And if I do, I'm begging you, please find another way Wish I had the words to say to make a better day But I don't, so I guess we'll be on our way And when you throw away games that you have to play away You can proceed to move forward and go all the way Every time I'm looking deep into your eyes I know, never meant to hurt you, baby girl, no more All the pain and tears that I had inside No pride, no surprise, it's not tried and tried Too many lies, no compromise, I'm gonna rise Tears that I cried inside remain dry Stuffed deep inside with no one to confide Running away, far away, where no place to hide Correction, correction, I need a correction for my erection No, it's just not me, it's not seven for you It's not the clear view I'm sorry, boo, you gotta move from the view It's not the lake, it's not like your Ricky Glade Can't take up two seats, you can't balance that I'm not your man, if I'm not your man You understand that, that's a plan I know you said goodbye too many times And it hurt my lines inside my mind So I took it out on you, every hurt that I felt, I'm sorry Never meant to make you bewild So every time I hurt you, baby, I'm crying Every time I took you, baby, I'm lying If I lied to you, to the me, I can tell you It's like this, it goes Every time I'm looking deep into your eyes I know, I never meant to hurt your baby girl no more All the pain and tears that I hide inside No pride, no surprises, I tried and tried Too many lies, no compromise, I'm gonna rise The tears that I cried inside remain dry Stuffed deep inside with no one to confide Running away, far away, with no place to hide Got no place to hide With you looking out for me And you're twisting my reality No place to hide I got no place to hide from you No place to lie to you Oh I gotta run from you All the lies and all the pride No more surprises, I tried and tried Every time I'm looking deep into your eyes I know, I never meant to hurt your baby girl no more All the pain and tears that I hide inside No pride, no surprises, I tried and tried Too many lies, no compromise, I'm gonna rise The tears that I cried inside remain dry

lyricsSegments.text: I'm back in the hideout, I'm back in the right one
Can't hide no more from you, I can't hide from my past man
What we gonna do again?
Every time I look deep into your eyes I know
Never meant to hurt you baby girl, no more
All the pain and tears that I hide inside
No pride, no surprises, I tried and tried
Too many lies, no compromise, only rise
Tears that I cry inside remain dry
Stuffed deep inside with no one to confide
Running away, far away, but no place to hide
Every story gots at least two sides
Part truth, part lies, keeping my eyes on the prize
Gonna rise, remain wise, gonna rise till I die
Alright, I think it's best for us to say goodbye
Quit the fight, sacrifice, worth the price
Now suffice, let your taste buds entice
Take some advice, yeah, never thinking twice
Twice nice, what I like, I'm gonna write
Doing it right all night, despite your ways
So quick to take flight, just a fly away
It's gonna be alright, it's gonna be okay
Just might seem to fade down the path I stray
And if I do, I'm begging you, please find another way
Wish I had the words to say to make a better day
But I don't, so I guess we'll be on our way
And when you throw away games that you have to play away
You can proceed to move forward and go all the way
Every time I'm looking deep into your eyes
I know, never meant to hurt you, baby girl, no more
All the pain and tears that I had inside

Running away, far away, where no place to hide
Correction, correction, I need a correction for my erection

I'm sorry, boo, you gotta move from the view
It's not the lake, it's not like your Ricky Glade
Can't take up two seats, you can't balance that
I'm not your man, if I'm not your man
You understand that, that's a plan
I know you said goodbye too many times
And it hurt my lines inside my mind
So I took it out on you, every hurt that I felt, I'm sorry
Never meant to make you bewild
So every time I hurt you, baby, I'm crying
Every time I took you, baby, I'm lying
If I lied to you, to the me, I can tell you
It's like this, it goes
Every time I'm looking deep into your eyes
I know, I never meant to hurt your baby girl no more
All the pain and tears that I hide inside
No pride, no surprises, I tried and tried
Too many lies, no compromise, I'm gonna rise
The tears that I cried inside remain dry

Running away, far away, with no place to hide
Got no place to hide
With you looking out for me
And you're twisting my reality
No place to hide
I got no place to hide from you
No place to lie to you
Oh
I gotta run from you
All the lies and all the pride
No more surprises, I tried and tried
Every time I'm looking deep into your eyes
I know, I never meant to hurt your baby girl no more
All the pain and tears that I hide inside
No pride, no surprises, I tried and tried
Too many lies, no compromise, I'm gonna rise
The tears that I cried inside remain dry
